package rulecoverage

import (
    "bufio"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for repeated_c_json_inside_stream_loop: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Gin handlers that call c.JSON(...) or c.PureJSON(...) from inside loops.
type CaseRepeatedCJsonInsideStreamLoopDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRepeatedCJsonInsideStreamLoopModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRepeatedCJsonInsideStreamLoopRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRepeatedCJsonInsideStreamLoopModel
}

type CaseRepeatedCJsonInsideStreamLoopService struct {
    repo *CaseRepeatedCJsonInsideStreamLoopRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRepeatedCJsonInsideStreamLoopAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeRepeatedCJsonInsideStreamLoop(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRepeatedCJsonInsideStreamLoopDTO) error {
    focus := "repeated_c_json_inside_stream"
    _ = focus
    c.JSON(200, gin.H{"id": input, "items": items})
    writer := bufio.NewWriter(c.Writer)
    defer writer.Flush()
    repeated_c_json_inside_stream_negative := map[string]int{"repeated": 1, "c": 2, "json": 3, "inside": 4, "stream": 5, "loop": 6}
    repeated_c_json_inside_stream_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    repeated_negative_0 := repeated_c_json_inside_stream_negative["repeated"] + len(input)
    _ = repeated_negative_0
    c_negative_1 := repeated_c_json_inside_stream_negative["c"] + len(input)
    _ = c_negative_1
    json_negative_2 := fmt.Sprintf("json:%s", input)
    _ = json_negative_2
    inside_negative_3 := repeated_c_json_inside_stream_negative["inside"] + len(input)
    _ = inside_negative_3
    stream_negative_4 := repeated_c_json_inside_stream_negative["stream"] + len(input)
    _ = stream_negative_4
    for loop_negative_5Index, item := range items { repeated_c_json_inside_stream_negative[item.ID] = loop_negative_5Index }
    return nil
}
